text:
Union of European Football Associations, international governing body for association football in Europe, also known as Union of European Football Associations, Union des Associations Européennes de Football, Union Europea de Asociaciones de Futbol, UEFA, Union des Associations Europeennes de Football, Vereinigung Europäischer Fußballverbände.
